commands.review_summary:
The PR adds verbose Discord reply-skip logging for aborted and reasoning payloads, removes one `runtime.error` optional chain, and adds formatter unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has silent returns at the abort and reasoning gates inside `processDiscordMessage`. I did not run a live gateway-abort reproduction in this read-only review.
